message:
refactor(guard,search,share,storage): code quality improvements across crates

Guard:
- Improve guard rule matching and formatting consistency

Search-core:
- Refine canonical path normalization and vector index formatting

Share:
- Improve bundle finalization, probe detection, and error handling patterns

Storage:
- Minor storage layer formatting and consistency improvements

No behavioral changes — improves code clarity and formatting consistency
across multiple crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
